misc: Struggles with his gender identity, occasionally participating in events under his female alter-ego, "Eva".
biography: Marcus, representing Kurk Golf, is a deeply ingrained part of the Hector Trophée narrative, preparing for what will be his thirteenth consecutive appearance in 2026. This remarkable streak of unbroken participation since the tournament's inception underscores a singular devotion to the event's unique blend of camaraderie and competition.

Over the course of his twelve prior outings, Marcus has consistently demonstrated a profound commitment to the challenging aspects of the game. Despite his unwavering presence, the ultimate accolades, neither the coveted Hector Trophée for the winning pair nor the individual Victor Trophy, have yet to fall within his grasp. His journey is a testament to the enduring pursuit of excellence, regardless of immediate triumph.

Beyond the scores, Marcus brings a distinct dimension to the Trophée. He is known for a journey of self-discovery and expression, openly embracing his gender identity. This facet of his personality, at times manifesting in participation under his alter-ego, "Eva," speaks to a rare courage and authenticity that transcends the golf course. It is a powerful reminder that the spirit of competition is intertwined with personal truth.

As he approaches his thirteenth challenge, Marcus remains an active and vital participant in Hector events. His continued presence and unique narrative enrich the very fabric of the tournament, inspiring admiration not only for his persistent quest for victory but also for his profound embodiment of individuality in the competitive arena.
